case_title: MOHAMED AHMED AMDOUNI VS. SHEREE ANN JONES

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AMDOUNI, MOHAMED AHMED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MOHAMED AHMED AMDOUNI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEREEE JONES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
